name: ModifyTouristData
description: Change data associated with your account.
postconditions: The system shall notify the successful modification of data.
The system shall notify the successful modification of data.
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.
steps: Access to functionality for the modification of data.
Loads the data and displays them in a form.
Edit the fields in the form and submit.
Check the modified information and asks for confirmation of the change. Where the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
